description: An alumnus received an email about Homecoming weekend and has questions about registering for an event.

nodes.task_description: Identify the alumnus and the event they are interested in (e.g., 'Alumni Tailgate Party').

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the alumnus's identity and the event details.

nodes.task_description: Explain the event details, including cost, time, location, and registration deadline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides all relevant event information.

nodes.task_description: Assist the alumnus with completing the event registration over the phone.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully registers the alumnus and processes their payment.
